title: An Act appropriating $20,000,000 from the Virgin Islands Insurance Guaranty Fund as a contribution to the General Fund of the Treasury of the Government
text:
ACT NO.8 9 0 9
BILL NO. 35-0362
THIRTY-FIFTH LEGISLATURE OF THE VIRGIN ISLANDS
Regular Session
2024
An Act providing an appropriation from the Virgin Islands Insurance Guaranty Fund as a
contribution to the General Fund ofthe Treasury of the Government of the Virgin Islands in
the fiscal year October 1. 2024. through September 30, 2025
---0---
Be it enacted by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands:
SECTION 1. Notwithstanding any other law, the sum of S20,000,000 is appropriated
from the Virgin Islands Insurance Guaranty Fund for the fiscal year October 1, 2024, through
September 30, 2025, as a contribution to the General Fund ofthe Treasury ofthe Government
ofthe Virgin Islands.
Thus passed by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands on September 27, 2024.
Witness our Hands and Seal of the Legislature of the Virgin Islands this 3 Oay of
September, AD., 2024.
President
Secretary

jjiAA A
Bill No. 35- 0362 is hereby approved.
Witness my hand and the Seal of the Government of
the United States Virgin Islands at Charlotte Amalie,
St Thomas, This t’”- day ofOctober, 2024 AM.
Governor
